name: Chilies Rellenos with Cheese
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Lard or vegetable oil for frying (more if needed)
recipeInstructions:
1. Toast chilies on a hot griddle on all sides until skins begin to blister.
2. Place in a plastic bag, seal the bag, and allow chilies to steam for 20 minutes.
3. Peel chilies and discard skins. Slice chilies lengthwise 1/4 inch from stem to 1/4 inch from tip. Remove seeds and piths; leave stem intact.
4. Place an equal amount of cheese in each chili. Roll stuffed chilies in flour, coating evenly.
5. Set aside. Separate eggs; beat whites until stiff. Beat yolks with water and salt; fold into whites.
6. Heat lard or oil in a skillet over medium heat. Dip chilies into egg mixture, ensuring they are fully coated.
7. Fry chilies until light golden brown, turning occasionally to ensure even cooking.
8. Drain on paper towels before serving.
